title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!
